  • Want a quick offer?

Nationwide car buying – instant

Sell your car quickly and easily. We buy all types of cars – in almost any condition.

Fast quote • Simple paperwork • Payment on the spot

+36 30 491 59 09

Why sell your car to us?

Ads, bargaining, scheduling, unreliable buyers… With us it won’t drag on for weeks: send the details, get an offer – and if it works for you, we handle the rest.

The process is simple: contact → offer → inspection → paperwork → payment.

How does it work?

Fastest

Instant purchase
Cash / bank transfer

  • 🧪 On-site inspection and valuation
  • 🔒 Fair offer – no hidden fees
  • 🧩 Purchase contract + paperwork handling
  • 👨‍💻 Immediate payment
  • ⏱️ Even today
  • 💯 Fast, hassle-free process
+36 30 491 59 09

Damaged / faulty cars
No problem

  • 🛠️ Mechanical issues, non-running, expired inspection
  • 📦 Accident-damaged, insurance cases
  • 🚀 We can arrange transport (by agreement)
  • ⚙️ We help with the administration
  • ⏱️ Flexible scheduling
  • 💯 Quick decision
+36 30 491 59 09

Company / multiple cars
Custom offer

  • ⚡ Valuation of multiple cars in one go
  • 🔍 Transparent, market-based pricing
  • 🎨 Contract and invoicing as needed
  • 📈 Organized pickup / transport
  • ⏱️ Fast turnaround
  • 💯 Reliable partner
+36 30 491 59 09

About us

Our goal is simple: selling your car should not be stressful. We give a fast offer, schedule flexibly, and help with paperwork – so you only hand over the car and we pay.

Want a quick offer?

Call us and tell us your car details (model, year, mileage, condition) and get an offer immediately!
